testcase.name: loginTest

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //a[@title='View my customer account']/span, but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[@title='View my customer account']/span"}.
